posts.text: Is there any standard way to identify whether an SGB is undervalued? — You may refer to this site for hunting sgbs at discount… although most of the sgbs trade at premium after new issues have stopped since 2023. posts.author: Lokesh_Gogikar
posts.text: Is there any standard way to identify whether an SGB is undervalued? — I had a question regarding SGB pricing. Do you guys consider theoretical value vs market price before buying? I’ve noticed sometimes bonds trade at a discount, but I wasn’t tracking it earlier. Recently started using a simple tracker ( SGB Gold ) to compare values — seems helpful. Would like to know if experienced investors here actively track this or just buy based on gold price.
